sanskrit:
पूर्वाभ्यासेन तेनैव ह्रियते ह्यवशोऽपि सः।
जिज्ञासुरपि योगस्य शब्दब्रह्मातिवर्तते॥
transliteration:
pūrvābhyāsena tenaiva hriyate hy avaśo 'pi saḥ |
jijñāsur api yogasya śabda-brahmātivartate ||
literal_meaning: By previous practice, even against his will, he is drawn; curious about yoga, he transcends scriptural sound.
contextual_meaning: Deep learning from past lives acts like an inner magnet; once curiosity for wholeness awakens, external rules lose their grip.
psychological_state: Flow state triggered by archetypic memory; ego scripts dissolve into intrinsic motivation.
trigger_scenario: A once-obsessive perfectionist suddenly drops the checklist and meditates effortlessly after a near-death experience.
anchor_text: Old practice pulls you home; wonder dissolves every rule.
